new_claims.claim_text: Images presented as Artemis II moon photos are actually astrophotographer Prathamesh Jaju's work.
new_claims.notes: Claim refuted by web search confirming Prathamesh Jaju's work was from 2021 and unrelated to Artemis II. Demonstrates misattribution used to sow doubt.

new_claims.claim_text: Netanyahu and his wife have been officially declared dead.
new_claims.notes: Persistent false claim, despite previous debunking. Contributes to disinformation in geopolitical narratives.

new_claims.claim_text: A Dubai plane carrying Israeli soldiers crashed near Tel Aviv's airport, allegedly hit by an Iranian hypersonic missile.
new_claims.notes: Persistent false claim, despite previous debunking. Contributes to disinformation in geopolitical narratives.
